metadata.description: The Claw Stack — Memory → Evaluation → Credential → Access Control for AI agents. One install, full pipeline.

plugins.name: ai-iq
plugins.description: SQLite-backed long-term memory with tiers (working/episodic/semantic), W3C Verifiable Credentials, drift detection, and wing/room access control. The memory + credential layer of the Claw Stack.

plugins.name: bot-circus
plugins.description: Multi-bot Telegram orchestrator with per-bot persona, shared/ringfenced memory, and passport-gated access control. The access-control layer of the Claw Stack.
